---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What pain point does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like in detail. How would it work from a user perspective?

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. Why is your proposed solution better?

## User Stories

As a [user type], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

### User Story 1

- **Role**: [e.g. Student, Teacher, Admin]
- **Goal**: [What they want to accomplish]
- **Benefit**: [Why it matters]

### User Story 2

- **Role**: [e.g. Student, Teacher, Admin]
- **Goal**: [What they want to accomplish]
- **Benefit**: [Why it matters]

## UI/UX Design

If applicable, include mockups, wireframes, or design ideas:

- **Screenshots**: [Attach any design mockups]
- **User Flow**: [Describe the user interaction flow]
- **Design Requirements**: [Any specific design considerations]

## Technical Considerations

- **Backend Changes**: [API endpoints, database changes, etc.]
- **Frontend Changes**: [Components, pages, state management, etc.]
- **Dependencies**: [New libraries or services needed]
- **Performance Impact**: [Any performance considerations]

## Priority

- [ ] High - Critical for user experience
- [ ] Medium - Important but not urgent
- [ ] Low - Nice to have

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criteria 1: [What must be true for this to be complete]
- [ ] Criteria 2: [What must be true for this to be complete]
- [ ] Criteria 3: [What must be true for this to be complete]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Related Issues

- Related to #[issue number]
- Depends on #[issue number]
- Blocks #[issue number]

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched the existing issues
- [ ] I have provided a clear and concise description
- [ ] I have described the problem this solves
- [ ] I have considered alternatives
- [ ] I have defined acceptance criteria
